news.paragraph: Gold prices are currently holding steady as a rising US dollar follows a surge in US wholesale inflation. Traders should keep an eye on the upcoming US-China meeting, which may serve as a catalyst for market volatility. With gold prices sitting tight, the immediate context is defined by macroeconomic shifts and potential geopolitical developments.
headlines: Exchange-Traded Funds, Equity Futures Mixed Pre-Bell Wednesday Ahead of US-China Meeting
